# AnyGif Bot

> AnyGif is the most private Telegram bot in the world. It converts any video URL into a GIF, supports 1,700+ websites, costs 10 Telegram Stars per GIF, and is built so that not even we can see what you're doing.

AnyGif lets users paste any video link, choose a start time and duration (up to 10 seconds), and receive a GIF instantly. If generation fails, Stars are automatically refunded. We never know who you are, we never see what you send, and nothing is stored after your GIF is delivered.

## Pages

- [Home](https://anygifbot.com/): Landing page with features, how it works, supported sites, and FAQ
- [Privacy Policy](https://anygifbot.com/privacy.html): Full privacy policy - zero data collection, fully anonymous service

## Links

- [Open AnyGif Bot in Telegram](https://t.me/anygif_bot): Start using the bot
- [Contact on X](https://x.com/alexandercranga): Developer contact
